Elaborate Scimitar  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +9 MANA: +10
SV DISEASE: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: DRU
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Elaborate Scimitar
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +9 MANA: +10
SV DISEASE: +5 SV POISON: +5
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: DRU
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Elaborately Runed Scimitar
Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Janaki Swiftpaw
Lucy Entry By:Tiana
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 07:10:31
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Quests | Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Druid Epic: Nature Walker's Scimitar

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Burning Woods
Quest Name
Druid Epic: Nature Walker's Scimitar
Interim reward in the Druid Epic Quest


Uploaded April 23rd, 2023 by Drewinette
Send a correction
Post Comment
Didn't tak e too long
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2004 at 4:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362859807
6 posts
I just ran around the zone and killed every mammoth lik creature that I could find. Took about 45 minutes for the Tainted to show up on track. I didn't find many calves at all I was mostly killing the full sized mammoths.

Barkamus - 52 druid of bristlebane

Required Level

# Feb 09 2004 at 9:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793565051
1 post
YOU CAN START THE DRUID EPIC QUEST AT LEVEL 46!!!!!
▲ Page top
level 50.
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2002 at 1:37 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759132406
17 posts
you can start the epic quest at level 50 by asking telin darkforest "what action?"

before that he "cannot discuss these matters with you until you have gained more experience" or whatever.
▲ Page top
RE: level 50.
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2003 at 4:36 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592256833474
19 posts
I just Dinged to lvl 46 tonight and like every other ding sence lvl 40 i went to check and see if i could start this quest it worked so you can start it at 46!
▲ Page top
RE: level 50.
QuoteReply
# Jan 06 2004 at 8:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784416642
View User Forum
14 posts
I can confirm that you can start at level 46. I started yesterday and he does everything you need to get going on the quest.

ZippytheElf
Druid of the 46th Season
Order of Loki
The Seventh Hammer

Edited, Tue Jan 6 08:50:33 2004
▲ Page top
RE: level 50.
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2004 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754046898
View User Forum
11 posts
When i dinged 46 with my druid, i went to see the dude in burning woods.. i hailed him, and he basically told me to go away. i then went to Crushbone, and slaughtered many orcs. (wow, that was a fun time). i went back to him (still lvl 46) and tried again. lo and behold, he answered me with the epic dialogue, and i started my epic at 46.

i'm now 47, and am about a third of the way thru the kills, and have all the forages, and have done the turn in for the bowl. only have to do the Athele cycle, and kill VS, and the corrupted's for the cleansed spirits.

so yes, you can start the epic at 46, if you work your faction. (i'm a half elf, and was told i needed to work faction for him to talk to me)

if you're a wood elf, i think he'll talk to you at 46 (will post more when my wife gets her wood elf druid to 46 and tries it).. don't know about halfling tho.

cheers all, and i hope this helped someone...
▲ Page top
RE: level 50.
QuoteReply
# Dec 27 2002 at 7:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1612138641199
13 posts
Aye, I keep hearing many stories of not being able to start till 50. I myself started at 35 (52 now and still don't have whole thing done but oh well....)

Tarz
52 Druid

5 posts
Maybe they changed it recently...but I was able to start mine at level 42. All I need to do is get a Jade Reaver and do the Dark Elf Corruptor...I have the Worn Dark Metal Coin I need to trigger him.

Legolinn
45 Druid
▲ Page top
Can Elaborate Scimitar be MQ'd??
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2002 at 10:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757267503
Scholar
21 posts
I was wondering if the Elaborate Scimitar can be multi-quested?

I am giving up my 52 druid and she is weilding the Elaborate Scimitar and has all the items needed for the final turn in, with the exception of killing Faydedar. She hasnt done that yet.

Any info would be greatly appreciated. Thanks.

Kolianu Fyrestorm
52 Druid -Retired
Vazaelle
▲ Page top
RE: Can Elaborate Scimitar be MQ'd??
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2002 at 12:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253267637
12 posts
Unfortunately, all the rest of the stuff is just drops.. Tainted / Corrupted line of mobs..
You just need to get the three spirits and kill the dragon in TD..
Why not just do the rest of them?
I suppose that you could probably MQ it, but I wouldn't trust it.. You'd have to have a druid with perfect faction (I had to work on mine with it), and they'd have to have all the spirits...
Just suck it up and get your druid the rest of the stuff.. It'll look uber neat to have your epic on a retired character. :D
▲ Page top
Only two scimitars
QuoteReply
# Jun 22 2002 at 3:41 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592246764111
7 posts
All I have left to do is kill faydedar and I am dnoe with the epic. Whoever told you that there are TWO scimitars before the epic lied to you. You get the Elaborate Scimitar, and in the end you exchange it (along with the spirits) for the NWS... there is no "upgrade" to the Elaborate Scimitar other than the epic
▲ Page top
Question
QuoteReply
# May 13 2002 at 12:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778833972
18 posts
I am currently a 37 druid but i have some friends could this be obtained before lvl 50? i have most of the stuff for quest already almost all corrupted but 2 just cuz i goto hunt were they spawn and people will let you loot if their is no other higher lvl druids in zone
▲ Page top
I think you can start at Lvl 56
QuoteReply
# May 25 2002 at 2:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759175127
5 posts
Yesterday I became Lvl 46 (Finally while the rest of my guild was on Plane of Hate). And I checked again if Telin Darkforest would give me the Worn Note in Burning Woods to start this quest.
Wow, yeah he replied to my "What action?" question and gave it to me now that I am 46. (He did not at 45).
So I ran around and did lots of things for the quest I could not do before because of beeing too low level.
So I can tell that you must be Lvl 46 to start this quest and I think you can finish it with 46 :)
(If you have enough friends of the right levels)


Elenar Sternensturm
Lvl 46 Druid on Solusek Ro of
Moonwhisper
---- Ehre und Stärke ----
▲ Page top
RE: I think you can start at Lvl 56
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2003 at 7:12 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257949517
35 posts
from what ive been told, and what im gonna believe until proven otherwise. you can start the epic pre 50. i started mine when i was 48, and damnit all i got left is faydedar(if only i could get some help =( ). however, ive been told that you can not do the final turn in till you reach 50. of course it doesnt matter anymore being lvl 55 and all.

Be careful and do not turn in item before 51 !!!
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2002 at 3:15 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759175127
5 posts
I asked a GM yesterday if you can fullfill the Epic Quest before 51 and he replied that you should be 51. So do not turn in any items or you might loose them.

I myself already turned in many items with 46 and recieved everything in regular. But perhaps only the last turn in will not work, but you knows?

So I will not turn in more items until 51 for now.

until you hit level 50 telin darkforest will now say something like "you need to have more experience before i can discuss these matters with you" or something close to that.

when you hit 50 he will talk to you however, and you can start the epic quest.

until you hit level 50 telin darkforest will now say something like "you need to have more experience before i can discuss these matters with you" or something close to that.

#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 07 2001 at 11:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ok the info is INCORRECT you must kill VS Remains for the stones not VS himself my ranger and druid friends are doing this quest (well ranger is not doing this one hes doing his) i hope this helps
RE: inccorect info
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 3:56 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592249548720
Scholar
89 posts
Actually, you can kill VS for a stone. But the normal spawn VS only drops 1 stone per death. Hand VSR the globe of fireflies and the 49 cleric rez spell and he spawns into a weaker VS that drops 2 stones and no other loot.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 30 2001 at 9:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) is this the sword that looks like acid flowing out of it
Acid?

# Mar 22 2002 at 9:05 PM Rating: Default

what you talking about? The Nature Walker's Scimitar has Leaves floating from it.. not acid,

no that is the nature walkers shimitar

Druid Epic
QuoteReply
# Feb 07 2001 at 8:34 PM Rating: Excellent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
This is the scimitar returned from Ella Foodcrafter during the Druid Epic quest. Requires the defeat of a couple of 50+ MoBs to get this far.
▲ Page top
Correction
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2001 at 9:22 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The only hard part to get this is killing Venril Sathir and getting the stone he drops. Everythings else is mainly foraging and carrying stuff from one end of the land to the other.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 08 2001 at 3:46 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Oh, yeah, that Faydedar is one big pushover. ******.
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2001 at 4:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Faydedar is on part 2 of the quest and isnt required to be killed to get the scimitar. Only VS and the DE Corruptor are needed to be killed to get the elaborate scimitar. All the other mobs that are killed are in part 2 of the quest which requires the cleansed spirits of 3 continents. the scimitar and the cleansed spirits give you the final nature walkers scimitar. Before you criticize others, be sure to have your own facts straight, lest you end up looking stupid.

▲ Page top
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2001 at 12:34 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm going to camp for the Jade Reaver. I won't be extorted by other players.
▲ Page top
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2001 at 11:27 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Well you also need a Dark Reaver.. which is found on Black Reavers in CoM (50+)..

Yeah, you can buy it.. but they are so rare people are selling for 10kpp+

Meaning that most druids end up having to go and fight for theirs (Especially since Rangers need them for their epic too).
▲ Page top
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Feb 09 2001 at 7:37 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
That is correct. You need the Jade Reaver to get this far. Also, Jade Reavers go for 5kpp on the Nameless Server fyi...
▲ Page top
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2001 at 5:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
All i know about Jade Reavers is that they use to be a 5k weapon. Last one i saw was going for 25k cause it is part of an epic quest. Welcome to supply and demand economics.
▲ Page top
RE: Correction
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 1:07 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Jade Reavers can EASILY be gotten in CoM by one group of approximately 50ish in level. In case of multi spawns (see below) you may want a back-up group to sit by until the first Reaver is dead to "tag" in while group 1 rests up. Go all melee (as they resist) with a good Cleric (or 2 if you like) and tear em up. Some Reavers will spawn another Reaver when their killed. I don't remember the ratio or why they do, but I've noticed that some Reavers will spawn as many as 3-4 more Reavers in succession when they are killed. I was in a group once that had 4 total spawns off one Reaver and a Jade Reaver dropped off each corpse. We had so many after awhile that we were giving them away to people in the zone.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 08 2001 at 12:01 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No, the druid epic weapon is the Nature Walker's Scimitar and is way nicer than this :O)
RE: Druid Epic
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2001 at 11:42 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591751843315
13 posts
You are correct in one thing, Then Nature Walker's Scimitar is alot nicer than this one, but you need this scimitar to get the Nature Walker's Scimitar. You need to turn the Cleansed Spirits from Kunark, Faydwer, and Antonica as well as this sword to complete the quest.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 04 2002 at 10:44 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) actually you need 2 scimitars before you can get the nature walkers scimitar. this is just the first one, and you hand this one in and it gets upgraded, and that one you hand in for nature walker. i know i am half way done with the quest already.
RE: Druid Epic
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 3:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971708573
View User Forum
194 posts
I think you're wrong. From what I've heard and read, you get this one first, then hand this ONE scimitar in with the 3 cleansed spirits to get the final Epic. I only count one scimitar befor the Final prize.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Feb 08 2001 at 12:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) He said "during" meaning it is one of the items you get on the way to getting the epic quest weapon. You get this as an intermediate reward
RE: Druid Epic
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2003 at 1:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251394019
View User Forum
Scholar
22 posts
LOL, it doesn't matter if he said "before" "during" or "after" he is still wrong, the is NO other upgrade to this "the elaborate scimitar" other than the EPIC. 4 items needed for the epic turn in, this and the 3 cleansed spirits.
